query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_projects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN vg.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_gate,
  SUM(CASE WHEN vg.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_gate_yet
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN projectValidationGates vg ON vg.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm');
